## Change class

- [ ] Semantics
- [ ] Checker or soundness proof
- [ ] Evidence schema
- [ ] Backend adapter
- [ ] Agent or Studio surface
- [ ] Foundry or benchmark
- [ ] Documentation only

## Assurance impact

Describe changes to the trusted path, claim strength, accepted axioms, replay, and compatibility.

## Tests

- [ ] Positive
- [ ] Negative
- [ ] Adversarial
- [ ] Offline replay
- [ ] Performance impact reported

## Ecosystem impact

State whether the change duplicates, replaces, or integrates existing Lean or solver work.
